full_text:
Zhao Yue
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhao Yuewas born in Hanyang. Father worried about his fate, kept hostage by Ma Chao and killed when Ang rebelled. Zhao Yue was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Zhao Yue lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
